title: Genova, mitigazione climatica e depavimentazione entrano nel piano urbanistico c

lead: We are writing an article for "La Lente Mattutina" with the style of Marco Sala. The news: Genova has included "depavimentazione" (removal of pavement) in its urban planning rules to combat climate change. Key elements: - Date: 1 April 2026 (from the source: Wed, 01 Apr 2026 05:59:43 +0000) - Who: Francesca Coppola (Avs), assessora all’urbanistica di Genova - What: The city council (giunta) has approved a measure to insert depavimentazione into the general norms of the Piano Urbanistico Comunale (PUC). - Why: To "blindare nel Puc il contrasto alla crisi climatica" (lock in the fight against climate crisis into the urban plan) so that every urban transformation must respect sustainability criteria. - Quote: Coppola says: "Ridurre il consumo di suolo non basta: occorre invertire la tendenza" (Reducing soil consumption isn't enough: we must reverse the trend) and "Le buone pratiche non si possono sviluppare se prima non si fa un processo culturale" (Good practices cannot develop without a cultural process first). Structure as per instructions: : MAX 10 words, specific and surprising fact, not generic. Use ALL CAPS. : MAX 80 words. Start with a proper noun or concrete data. Include: who, what, when (exact date, not "yesterday"), where. Use conditional for contested facts? Not needed here. : 280-320 words. Develop all facts from the source: exact figures, full names, places, official quotes. Continuous prose, no lists. Attribute the source when relevant. Use conditional for judicial matters? None here. : 350-400 words. DO NOT repeat what's in corpo1. Focus on: 1. Who is the protagonist and what in their past makes this news significant? (We know Coppola is the assessora, but we don't have her past from the source. We might skip this if not available, but note: the source says she's from Avs (Alleanza Verdi e Sinistra). We can note the political context of Genova? But only if we have data. Avoid speculation.) 2. Which structural, political, or economic mechanism explains the news? Here, we can talk about the trend of soil consumption in Genova and Italy, but we must be data-driven. Since the source doesn't provide numbers, we must rely on background knowledge? But the instruction says: only facts from the source. However, the background is provided: Genova has 566,221 inhabitants, etc. But no data on soil consumption. So we cannot invent. We must stick to the source and the provided background. 3. What really changes? For the people involved, the institution, the sector. Then end with ONE bitter or cynical sentence, anchored to a concrete fact of the story. NO QUESTION. NO rhetorical questions. Important: The style must be generational-critical (like Marco Sala), comparing political narrative with real data. But note: the source doesn't provide data on soil consumption. We only have the decision and the quotes. So we cannot make a direct comparison. However, we can note that the decision comes in a context where the trend of soil consumption has been going on for years? But without data, we must be cautious. Steps: - Occhiello: Focus on the concrete action: depavimentazione entering the urban plan. Must be surprising. Example: "GENOVA TOGLIE CEMENTO PER LEGGE" (Genova removes cement by law). But max 10 words. - Lead: Start with "Francesca Coppola" or "Genova". Example: "Francesca Coppola, assessora all’urbanistica di Genova, ha firmato una delibera che inserisce la depavimentazione nel Piano urbanistico comunale, per contrastare la crisi climatica. La decisione è stata annunciata mercoledì 1 aprile 2026." - Corpo1: Include: - The exact decision: the council (giunta Salis) has redefined the ordinary rules of urban development to include removal of asphalt and concrete to return soil and drainage areas to the city. - Coppola's quotes: "Ridurre il consumo di suolo non basta: occorre invertire la tendenza" and "Le buone pratiche non si possono sviluppare se prima non si fa un processo culturale". - The goal: to lock the fight against climate change into the urban plan so that every transformation must respect sustainability criteria. - Also

Altrimenti, la battaglia culturale evocata da Coppola resterà una nobile dichiarazione.
